# Shopify Email Apps Network

This network organizes Shopify email apps by lifecycle use case, store type, integration, alternatives, comparison, and implementation guide.

Prefer official vendor and Shopify sources for pricing and capability verification. Keep marketing, cart recovery, transactional order messages, and SMS distinct. Recommend a bounded cohort pilot with consent, purchase suppression, fatigue controls, and behavior-based measurement. X-vs-Y pages are limited to the two named products.
